topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Previously confirmed subscriptions (e.g. CURSOR 95% €17.18/mo, APPLE.COM/BILL 60% €9.99/mo) must not reappear as pending with Confirm/Reject after container rebuild on financegnome.omniflow.cc.

backend/src/subscriptions/repository.rs upsert_pending_pattern and load_confirmed_fingerprints; detection.rs confirmed_fps skip; compute_fingerprint payee_key/interval/amount; postgres subscription_patterns persistence; /subscriptions React UI and subscription-scoped alerts.
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: US-0003 subscription persistence and detection pipeline; fingerprint keyed on payee_key + interval_days + median_amount per existing code audit.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Post-BUG-0014 rebuild on US-0010 external profile; postgres volume should persist across container rebuild; relates US-0003 confirm contract and BUG-0008 alert/list dedup; do not read .env secrets.

After rebuild + Full sync, GET /api/v1/subscriptions?status=confirmed includes Cursor and Apple patterns; no duplicate pending rows for same merchant; confirmed fingerprints skipped on detection rerun; alert unread count reconciles with list; operator smoke on omniflow external profile.
Operator confirms previously confirmed subscriptions stay confirmed through rebuild/restart; no spurious re-confirm prompts for CURSOR or APPLE.COM/BILL; OIDC external profile regression pass.

decomposition.rationale: Bounded defect on US-0003 subscription confirm persistence after post-BUG-0014 container rebuild; four intake hypotheses share one operator symptom (re-confirm prompts) and one verification gate (rebuild + Full sync on omniflow).
decomposition.split_axis: none — single bug with sub-hypotheses H1–H4

boundaries.BUG-0015: Confirmed subscription status must survive container rebuild and post-sync detection rerun; no duplicate pending rows or spurious Confirm/Reject for operator-known merchants (Cursor, Apple)

alternatives_considered: Reopen BUG-0008 — rejected (DONE; distinct confirm-persistence-after-rebuild symptom, not alert-count-only mismatch)
Merge into BUG-0014 — rejected (BUG-0014 DONE; subscription confirm is independent of ML/crypto/Grafana cluster)
Split fingerprint-drift vs DB-ephemeral into separate BUG ids — rejected (jointly testable on same rebuild smoke; discovery table separates hypotheses)
intake_hypotheses: fingerprint_drift — payee_key/amount/interval change yields new pending row despite prior confirm on different fingerprint
db_ephemeral — postgres volume lost on rebuild (ops)
alert_ui_desync — unread new_detection alerts for patterns confirmed in DB
detection_rerun_post_sync — Full sync after rebuild re-detects with changed grouping
